leads.title: Provincial Championships Merch
leads.signal: 🔥 RFP deadline March 28 — 6 days left
leads.notes: $10k-$25k. Apollo has CHL credibility (Mooseheads, Eagles, Wildcats).

leads.signal: Deadline ~April 15. $30k-$60k opportunity.
leads.notes: Multi-campus spirit wear contract. Hoodies, tees, hats for 13 campuses.

leads.title: Staff Uniforms & Branded Apparel
leads.signal: Expected Q2 2026. $80k-$150k.
leads.notes: Periodic tender for branded staff apparel. Register as vendor on NS procurement portal.

leads.title: Staff Branded Workwear
leads.signal: Annual cycle Q1-Q2. $40k-$90k.
leads.notes: HRM Recreation is best fit. Safety apparel may need certs.

leads.title: Provincial Championship Event Merch + Team NS 2027 Canada Winter Games
leads.signal: Relationship play — not formal tender. $15k-$40k. Canada Winter Games 2027 Quebec City confirmed.
leads.notes: Team Nova Scotia needs kitting for 2027 Canada Winter Games. Pitch both together.

leads.title: Athletic Apparel & Team Uniforms — 11 Universities
leads.signal: Multi-year contract. $60k-$100k. Leverage St. FX relationship.
leads.notes: 11 Atlantic Canadian universities. Monitor for renewal cycle.

leads.title: School Athletic Apparel Supply
leads.signal: Expected spring 2026. $50k-$120k.
leads.notes: Province-wide school athletic apparel. Longer-term target.

leads.title: Team NWT — 2027 Canada Winter Games Apparel
leads.signal: 2027 Canada Winter Games confirmed for Quebec City. Team NWT will need kitting.
leads.notes: Contact: Rita Mercredi, (867) 669-8326. Strong opportunity — they source externally. Previously issued RFP for 2026 Arctic Winter Games.

leads.title: Nova Scotia Music Week 2026 Official Merch
leads.signal: Event: Nov 12–15, 2026 Truro. Pitch now — Q2/Q3 sourcing window.
leads.notes: $8k-$20k. 29th year of NSMW. Staff shirts, volunteer apparel, fan tees. Ben's media connections (Advocate, Saltscapes) may get intro.

leads.title: Sommo Festival PEI — Event Merch / Collab
leads.signal: Event: Sept 11–12, 2026 Cavendish Beach PEI. Pitch this spring.
leads.notes: $10k-$25k. Collab angle is stronger than pure supply — Apollo x Sommo drop would be 🔥

leads.title: Jubilee Music Festival New Glasgow — Staff / Merch
leads.signal: Event: July 31–August 2, 2026. New Glasgow waterfront. Apollo's hometown.
leads.notes: Apollo is basically from Pictou County — this is a home game. Pitch for official merch and/or staff apparel. Existing relationship potential.

leads.company: SailGP — Canada Sail Grand Prix Halifax
leads.contact: SailGP Canada event team / Halifax Tourism
leads.title: SailGP Halifax 2026 — Staff/Fan Apparel + Merch
leads.signal: Returning to Halifax 2026. City investing $1M. High-visibility coastal event.
leads.notes: $15k-$40k. Tickets already selling out. Apollo's coastal heritage brand is a perfect fit. Premium event — staff uniforms or fan merch collab. Pitch via SailGP Canada or Halifax Tourism event partnership team.

leads.title: Evergreen Festival — Official Staff/Volunteer Apparel
leads.signal: 4-week event Nov–Dec 2026. Nova Scotian culture/craft focus. Pitch Q2.
leads.notes: $8k-$20k. Celebrating Nova Scotian culture, food, spirits, craft, art. Apollo is the brand for this — pitch for official staff/volunteer apparel or branded merch drop.

leads.title: Staff & Program Apparel
leads.signal: Active fitness centre, gymnasium, aquatics. Staff + program branded apparel opportunity.
leads.notes: Located in Pictou County Wellness Centre (home of PC Crushers). Apollo is local — strong relationship angle. Pitch for staff uniforms, program apparel, and seasonal branded gear.

leads.title: Gym Branded Apparel
leads.signal: One of Atlantic Canada's largest CrossFit gyms (4,000 sq ft). Community-driven culture. Custom member apparel is huge in CrossFit.
leads.notes: Bedford, NS. Founded 2016. CrossFit gyms are notorious for heavy branded merch spend — member tees, hoodies, tank tops every quarter. Perfect Apollo pitch.

leads.title: Custom Branded Merch + Staff Apparel
leads.signal: Family-owned microbrewery in Tatamagouche. Strong NS identity, loyal following. Merch play is obvious.
leads.notes: Right in Apollo's backyard (Pictou County area). Converted old butcher shop to brewery. Authentic story. Custom merch collab (Apollo x Tata Brew) could be a fire drop. Staff apparel also on the table.

leads.title: Custom Branded Merch + Staff Apparel
leads.signal: Dartmouth craft brewery with strong local identity. No-nonsense brand that aligns with Apollo's vibe.
leads.notes: Dartmouth, NS. Founded by 'two no-nonsense, beer-loving guys.' Staff apparel + branded merch. Collab potential given shared coastal, no-BS identity.
